channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree growth at base needs pruning, 30th May
item.description:
Trees on this street need bushy growth at bottom trimming as hard to get pram through

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Le May Avenue, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste (wooden boards/shelving) dumped on street, 30th May
item.description:
This junction of pelton road/Christchurch way is frequently used for overnight dumpingn of piles of building waste by vans. This time they have left several heavy wooden boards. It may be worth checking the adjacent LTN camera to see if you can identify the perpetrators.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 30th May
item.description:
Cannot walk through the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sanderstead Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped, 30th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped rubbish bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 30th May
item.description:
Overflowing litter bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Gravel Road, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley dumped, 30th May
item.description:
A shopping trolley has been dumped beside the pathway. It is on the hill inside East Wickham Open Space as you enter from the Highbanks Close entrance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highbanks Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree / Plant blocked up 1/3 of the pavement, 30th May
item.description:
Tree / Plant growing out to pavement and blocked up 1/3 of the pavement. Dangerous for the passenger when the bike cycle pass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Canal Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wardrobe panels on side of road, 30th May
item.description:
Wardrobe panels on side of road Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road traffic cones, 30th May
item.description:
I reported this previously. Road traffic cones have been left on the road, for no apparent legal purpose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Albury Street, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley in the river plz remove, 30th May
item.description:
Hello there is a trolley in the river please remove asap as it’s upsetting the ducks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 mattresses, 30th May
item.description:
Two mattresses have been dumped in this street. One on the grass by the shop and the other on the pavement further down towards the foot bridge.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bits of loose litter on Weston Street opposite guy street park, 30th May
item.description:
Several bits of loose litter on Weston Street- loose bottles, paper bags etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ship and Mermaid Row, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A metal pole/post has been knocked over on the pavement, 30th May
item.description:
A metal pole/post has been knocked over on the pavement outside a building site near number 6 Cross Road. It is right up against the wall but it is lying on the pavement and is a hazard which needs to be removed. It looks like it would have had a sign on the top of it at some point in the past but now there is just the post.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cross Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 30th May
item.description:
Loads of rubbish dumped on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walsham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overfilled, rubbish on floor, 30th May
item.description:
Somebody has put their household rubbish near the bin and it has split and is all over the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree down over canal, 30th May
item.description:
Fallen tree over canal. The canal is also very full of debris, stagnant, black water, and stinks, it needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Newacres Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Regent’s Park Barracks- on the pavement of Albany street, 30th May
item.description:
The street light pole is leaning sideways and is as a result hazardous - which may fall on pedestrians or oncoming traffic causing a serious accident!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Terrace Mews, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stagnant water, 30th May
item.description:
Canal full of branches and twigs, water is stagnant, and it smells bad. This stretch of water is in urgent need of some maintenance work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxglove Path, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree low branches making it impassable to walk down pavement, 30th May
item.description:
Tree low branches making it impassable to walk down pavement Low branches need pruning. Near entrance to tennis courts
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roundabout sign facing wrong way, 30th May
item.description:
Coming down Bridge Road to roundabout, the roundabout sign is not visible as it has been moved. Please fix
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
